title: System Engineer (Vmware, HyperV, Redhat) (AMK)
description:
Job Description:

  • Manages and monitors all installed systems and infrastructure to be in line with SOP (standard operating procedure) in place.
  • Defines customers’ needs and functionalities.
  • Assists in the coordination of system related activities and evaluation of the implementation design.
  • Installs, configures, and tests operating systems, application software, and system management tools.
  • Ensures the highest level of systems and infrastructure availability.
  • Collaborates and manages various stakeholders to ensure high quality deliverables within the guidelines, policies, and procedures.
  • Anticipating & troubleshooting systems related issues.
  • Continual maintenance of security, including backup and redundancy strategies.
  • Liaising with 3rd party vendors, IT providers, etc. for support where required.
  • Provide system documentation and SOPs.


Requirements:

  • BS/MS degree in Computer Science, Engineering or a related subject
  • Proven working experience in installing, configuring and troubleshooting UNIX /Linux based or windows environments.
  • Experience in Managing server virtualization technologies like VMWare, KVM or Microsoft Hyper-V
  • Experience with virtualization and containerization (e.g., VMware, Virtual Box)
  • knowledge of Linux: RedHat, CentOS, Debian, Amazon Linux, etc; Windows Server 2019 will be an advantange
  • Experience with monitoring systems
  • Solid experience in the administration and performance tuning of application stacks ) is an added advantage
  • Experience with automation software is an added advantage
  • Experience with networking knowledge (OSI network layers, TCP/IP) is an added advantage

Location: AMK (Travel to site in the East and Vivocity area whenever required)


Maestro HR

About Us

We specialized in providing a full range of recruitment placement.

Our specialized recruitment service division include IT, Finance & Accounting, HR & Administration, Sales & Marketing, Logistics & Supply Chain.

Our parent company, Combuilder Pte Ltd, was incorporated since 1999.  Our business include the large scale of software development for MRT projects & facility management for town councils.  We also provide IT manpower outsourcing to multi-national companies and government sectors.
